name: LinearInterpolator

members.name: interpolate
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Computes a linear interpolating function for the data set.
 *
 * @param x the arguments for the interpolation points
 * @param y the values for the interpolation points
 * @return a function which interpolates the data set
 * @throws DimensionMismatchException if {@code x} and {@code y}
 * have different sizes.
 * @throws NonMonotonicSequenceException if {@code x} is not sorted in
 * strict increasing order.
 * @throws NumberIsTooSmallException if the size of {@code x} is smaller
 * than 2.
 */

tags.name: x
tags.content: the arguments for the interpolation points
tags.description: the arguments for the interpolation points

tags.name: y
tags.content: the values for the interpolation points
tags.description: the values for the interpolation points

tags.content: function which interpolates the data set
tags.description: a function which interpolates the data set

tags.name: DimensionMismatchException
tags.content: if {@code x} and {@code y} have different sizes.
tags.description: if x and y have different sizes.

tags.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
tags.content: if {@code x} is not sorted in strict increasing order.
tags.assertion: assert !java.util.Arrays.stream(args[0]).boxed().reduce((a, b) -> a <= b ? b : null).isPresent();
tags.description: if x is not sorted in strict increasing order.

tags.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
tags.content: if the size of {@code x} is smaller than 2.
tags.description: if the size of x is smaller than 2.
